---
title: "Priscilla Lydia Sellon"
---

## Priscilla Lydia Sellon

**Dates:** (1821-1876)

### Description

founder of the Society of Sisters of Mercy of the Holy Trinity, Devonport

### Biography

CMY gave regular sums to her from 1853 but was disappointed when she came to Hursley to see her Sisters off to Honolulu. She was known as Lydia.  [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 15th 1894
- Letter from Feb 6th [1894]
- Letter from Jan 31 [1894]   
- Letter from March 14. 1849
- Letter from May 14, 1848

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
